role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Hangul script and specific Korean text on signs.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and settlement density within the East Asian context.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed temperate broadleaf species and forest composition appropriate to the region.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road markings, guardrails, and signage standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized utility pole styles and building materials to distinguish between regional neighbors.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, correctly identified the definitive linguistic and commercial markers (Hangul, GS25), and the tournament logic correctly used these to eliminate distractors and confirm the ground truth.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Hangul and specific brand names match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Vegetation and terrain descriptions are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Plant descriptions are consistent with the visible deciduous trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road infrastructure descriptions match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Utility pole and building descriptions match the image.
